title: uxbutton
text: uxbutton The uxbutton widget is a UI button control. It allows an end user to invoke any kind of explicitly defined action on clicking or pressing of the button. Default Logical Widgets The default logical widget is ux-Button . Triggers (web)trigger detail: This trigger is fired when a button is pressed or clicked. Extends fluent-button Web Component This widget is implemented using the Fluent web component fluent-button. Most of its features are also available in this widget. Most of its events are mapped to triggers. For more information, see the Fluent documentation on the fluent-button web component. Keyboard support When you press the Spacebar key, it invokes the button that has focus. Layout processing Widget class method processLayout() constructs the template HTML for this widget. It generates nodes for the control itself as well as slots for button text and icon, and returns it to Uniface. Use this function to enhance the widget with more static features. Widget properties The uxbutton widget supports the following properties: Table 1. Widget Properties Property Description html:title Defines a hover over text or tooltip, currently used as helper text. html:disabled Defines the widget as being disabled. html:tabindex Allows or prevents the widget from getting sequential focus usually with the Tab key. html:hidden Defines a boolean value that hides or shows the button widget. html:appearance Defines the appearance of the widget. The available options are: neutral (default) accent outline lightweight stealth class:classname Boolean value that adds or removes a specified class. icon Defines the name of the icon as it exists in the ui-fabric-core library. If name is not specified, no icon is displayed. The default is no icon. icon-position Defines the position of the icon. Note: If position is not defined or invalid, then icon position is start of the text. Start: The position of icon is before the text. In an RTL application, the button content is shown from right to left. This is a default position. End: The position of icon is after the text. In an RTL application, the button content is shown from right to left. exclude Defines that there will be no column for the field in the uxdatagrid . Note: This is actually not a widget property. It is a field property, used by the uxdatagrid widget if that is the containing entity's widget. Helper and validation error visualization A uxbutton does not allow changing the field value interactively, thus the field values might still be incorrect for various reasons. This means that the button needs to report the behavior. Hence, an exception is thrown from the showError() function. UI blocking When the field is in transaction, the uxbutton widget blocks user input by becoming inactive. Widget styling Search: Column CSS Selector Selected node(s) Filter results... 19 rows found CSS Selector Selected node(s) Filter 19 rows found Filter 19 rows found CSS Selector Selected node(s) .u-button Widget node .u-button.neutral Widget node when the appearance type is default or neutral .u-button.accent Widget node when the appearance type is accent .u-button.outline Widget node when the appearance type is outline .u-button.lightweight Widget node when the appearance type is lightweight .u-button.stealth Widget node when the appearance type is stealth .u-button.disabled or .u-button[disabled] Widget node when the widget is disabled .u-button:hover Widget node when the widget is hovered .u-button:active Widget node when the widget is active .u-button:focus Widget node when the widget has focus .u-button:focus-within Widget node when the widget has focus-within .u-button:focus-visible Widget node when the widget has focus-visible .u-button::part(control) Control node .u-button::part(start) Start node .u-button::part(content) Content node .u-button::part(end) End node .u-button .u-text Text node .u-button .u-icon Icon node .u-stretchable Defines how the widget stretches, allowing it to resize dynamically based on the layout rules. Widget sources The widget source files, such as JavaScript and CSS files, can be downloaded from the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/RocketSoftware/uniface-ux/tree/main/src/ux/button . Related Links ux-Button This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-Button properties. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
